micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Remove unrelated helper actions and duplicate service calls.

rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
rows.output: {"name":"When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#SoundSensor).soundsensor_sound > 50) { (#Speaker).speaker_stop() }"}

rows.command_eng: When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.
rows.output: {"name":"When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#RainSensor).rainsensor_rain == true) { (#Dehumidifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode(\"dehumidifying\") }"}

rows.command_eng: When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.
rows.output: {"name":"Turn on the light when the brightness falls below 100 lux","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LightSensor).lightsensor_brightness < 100) { (#Light).light_on() }"}
